chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT LARKANA C.P.No.D-1000 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on office objections at flag "A". 2. For hearing of main case. ------ 09.10.2025 Mr. Sajjad Ali Jamrani, Advocate holds brief for Mr. Ahmed Bux Abro, counsel for the Petitioner. Mr. Ali Anwar Kandhro, Additional Prosecutor General, Sindh a/w ASI Gul Muhammad Brohi, I.O of the case. Mr. Liaquat Ali Shar, Additional Advocate General, Sindh. ------ Learned Additional Advocate General, Sindh files statements on behalf of respondents No.2, 3 & 4, taken on record. The police officials present, submit that they have not confined the alleged missing person; however, the petitioner has filed this petition only to exert pressure upon the police so that they may not perform their paramount functions as the relatives of the petitioner are involved in certain cases. When confronted, learned counsel holding brief under the instructions submits that he does not wish to press this petition, learned Additional Advocate General, Sindh as well as Additional Prosecutor General, Sindh have no objection. Order accordingly. Judge Judge Manzoor
